default.block:
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/system_config/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3200/";
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/system_config" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3200/";
match ${REQ.path} "/.well-known/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3200/";
match ${REQ.path} "/1.0/identifiers/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3200/";
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/aicc/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4040"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/aicc" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4040"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/kmsg/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4030"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/kmsg" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4030"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/verify-hub/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3300"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/verify-hub" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3300"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/opendan/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4060"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/opendan" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4060"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/msg-center/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4050"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/msg-center" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4050"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/task-manager/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3380"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/task-manager" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3380"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/control-panel/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4020"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/control-panel" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4020"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/scheduler/*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3400"
match ${REQ.path} "/kapi/scheduler" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:3400"
match ${REQ.host} "filebrowser.*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:10160"
match ${REQ.host} "filebrowser-*." && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:10160"
match ${REQ.host} "sys.*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4020/";
match ${REQ.host} "sys-*" && return "forward http://127.0.0.1:4020/";
match ${REQ.host} "systest.*" && return "server buckyos_systest";
